{{Infobox character
| name = Tommison
| aliases = Captain Tommison
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|captain}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Sleepless cabal, [[The Reliable]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Navigator captain]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Captain Tommison is a [[Navigator]] who commands the vessel known as [[The Reliable]], a ship described as resembling an animated conch shell. Though legend claims his ship is unsinkable, it became stuck near a roaming island only one week after departing from the Capital. Tommison is characterized by his large physical stature, a long gray mustache, and navy blue attire including a bicorn hat. He possesses extensive experience interacting with [[Soulbound]] individuals due to the nature of his profession. During a period of isolation in a tower, Tommison was tasked with handling alchemical munitions; however, he died in an explosion involving these explosives. While some suggest his death may have been a mistake made while preparing the munitions in haste, others find the timing of the accident suspicious.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Serving as the captain of [[The Reliable]], Tommison operated as a specialized [[Navigator captain]]. His duties included the delivery of a crown to the [[Sleepless]] cabal and the packaging of alchemical munitions. His life ended when he and his entire crew perished under mysterious circumstances involving the [[Elders]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tommison]] is the captain of [[The Reliable]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tommison]] is a [[Navigator captain]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tommison]] was tasked with delivering a crown to the [[Sleepless]] cabal.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tommison]] was packaging alchemical munitions.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tommison]] is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Tommison]] and his crew died under mysterious Elder-related circumstances.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
